title: epicranthes undecifila
intro: Epicranthes undecifila is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the terrestrial orchids. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits associated with Epicranthes undecifila include its potential to aid in wound healing and its possible antiviral effects. Herbal preparations of Epicranthes undecifila are often used in traditional medicine, where it is typically dried and crushed to make tea or infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
